note: Per-field fill-value guidance (value type, required-ness, choice-group conditionals). Derived offline from schema/mapping/constraints; consistent with the fill engine. Not legal advice — verify against the official form before filing. Currency/time guidance is conservative because the printed '$'/AM-PM are not read here.

location.guidance: A Maine county name without the word 'County' (e.g. Cumberland).

full_name_first_middle_last.guidance: A person's name (the engine collapses to initials only if it overflows the box).

aliases_including_maiden_name.guidance: A person's name (the engine collapses to initials only if it overflows the box).

mailing_address.guidance: A street address; include the street line. City/State/ZIP may belong in their own boxes — check the printed labels.

text1.guidance: Free-form narrative text specific to the situation.

text2.guidance: Free-form narrative text specific to the situation.

address_1.guidance: A street address; include the street line. City/State/ZIP may belong in their own boxes — check the printed labels.
